description_long: This is a standard drum kit consisting of multiple drums and cymbals mounted on metal stands. The set includes a large black bass drum at the center, flanked by two tom-toms with beige shells and white drumheads, and a snare drum positioned in front. Two golden-yellow cymbals are mounted on adjustable stands, one to the left and one to the right, with a hi-hat on the left. The drumsticks are placed in front of the kit, suggesting readiness for play. The hardware is primarily metallic, with tripod bases for stability, and the overall appearance is clean and well-maintained.
description: A complete drum kit with beige drums, golden cymbals, and metallic stands, featuring a central black bass drum and visible drumsticks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered arrangement of toms, snare, and cymbals, with the hi-hat and snare drum clearly visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the symmetrical setup of the drum kit, with the bass drum centered and all drums and cymbals visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the right cymbal and toms, with the snare drum and hi-hat partially obscured.
description_view_3: Direct front view with drumsticks on the ground, showing the full face of the bass drum and all mounted drums and cymbals.
